user_core_questions.q1_dependency_correct: YES — 静的DAG非循環。planner->harness=depends_on hard宣言、intake->planner=intake.json artifact(soft)。非対称は意図的で正しい
user_core_questions.q2_citation_stale_avoidance: YES・最適 — upstream-pins.json(path+sha256+verified_at)をcheck-upstream-pins.pyがpytest fail-closed強制。event-driven化でtime-bomb回避。設計の白眉
user_core_questions.q3_cycle_works: YES(構造的) — emit-improvement-handoff->--mode update->source_improvement->provenance chainの機械閉路。Stage2/3/6は意図的人間工程。反映gap 5件をF1-F5で修正済
user_core_questions.q4_harness_hooks_needed: 不要=設計意図として正しい — harness-creatorはhooks/dir不在だがplugin.jsonに3plugin中最厚の配線・各hookは所有skillのscripts/へco-locate(9本)。cohesion上健全。F2でREADMEに明文化
